\tzpentry{ID3511}{Pi Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3511 introduces Pi Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ s_1(t)=A_1\sin(2\pi f_1 t + \phi_1),\qquad s_2(t)=A_2\sin(2\pi f_2 t + \phi_2). \]
